title: wikidata_entity
description: Schema for wikidata_entity from the Wikimedia Enterprise API

identifier.description: Wikidata item identifier (Q-number, e.g. Q42), or property identifier (P-number, e.g. P31)

type.description: The type of entity, either "item" or "property"

descriptions.description: Key-value pairs with descriptions in different languages

example.en: Championship held at Balbir Singh Juneja Indoor Stadium

aliases.description: Key-value pairs with aliases in different languages. Every language may have multiple aliases
